noise.invalidation_rule: A record is stale when profile_version differs from v1, sha256 is not a 64-character hex digest, or any key field is missing.

feature_sqlite.invalidation_rule: A record is stale when feature_version differs from v1, sha256 is not a 64-character hex digest, any key field is missing, or the SQLite schema lacks feature_version.

feature_json.invalidation_rule: A record is stale when feature_version differs from v1__ihash-whash, including changes to extraction logic or the resource icon hash method, sha256 is not a 64-character hex digest, or any key field is missing.
